title: Cinematic reading session with chapter switching updates content and illustration
description: Users can open a story and switch chapters multiple times with chapter title/content and illustration updating each time.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Wait for the story grid to finish loading
Click the first story card in the grid
Click a chapter in the sidebar that is not the currently active chapter
Click a different chapter in the sidebar
Click a third chapter in the sidebar
Verify the active chapter content updates to match the newly selected chapter and a chapter illustration is displayed

title: Switch chapters from the sidebar and see content update
description: Verifies a reader can switch chapters via the sidebar and the title, content, and illustration update to the newly selected chapter.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Click a different chapter in the sidebar
Click another different chapter in the sidebar
Verify the main chapter title reflects the currently selected chapter
Verify the chapter illustration and chapter content reflect the currently selected chapter

title: Chapter illustration updates when switching chapters
description: Verifies that the reader shows an illustration for the active chapter and updates it when the user switches to another chapter.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Wait for the reader content to finish loading
Switch to a different chapter using the chapter navigation
Verify the chapter illustration changes to match the newly active chapter

title: Switch chapters while TTS is active
description: Users can change chapters during active TTS and the reader continues to function without UI lockups.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Wait for the story grid to finish loading
Click the first story card in the grid
Start TTS narration for the active chapter
Click a different chapter in the sidebar while TTS is active
Verify the newly selected chapter content is displayed and the page remains responsive

title: Start and pause TTS narration with visualiser state changes
description: Verifies a reader can start TTS narration and then pause it, with the visualiser reflecting active vs paused narration.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Start TTS narration for the current chapter
Wait for narration playback to begin
Pause TTS narration
Verify the narration visualiser indicates narration is not actively playing

title: Start and pause TTS narration without locking the reader UI
description: Users can start TTS narration, pause it, and the reader remains responsive for navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Wait for the story grid to finish loading
Click the first story card in the grid
Start TTS narration for the active chapter
Pause TTS narration
Verify the reader remains usable and chapter navigation controls are still interactive

title: Changing chapters during active TTS does not lock the UI
description: Verifies that when a reader switches chapters while TTS is active, the UI remains responsive and shows the newly selected chapter.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Start TTS narration for the current chapter
Wait for narration playback to begin
Click a different chapter in the sidebar while TTS is active
Verify the chapter title and content update to the newly selected chapter

title: Browse and open a story from the catalogue
description: Users can browse the story grid, adjust a filter or sort option, and open a story to reach the immersive reader with story metadata and chapters visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Wait for the story grid to finish loading
Select a non-default option in a filtering or sorting control
Click the first story card in the grid
Verify the immersive reader view is displayed with a story title and a chapter list

title: Resume TTS narration after pausing
description: Verifies a reader can resume TTS narration after pausing and narration returns to an active playing state.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Start TTS narration for the current chapter
Wait for narration playback to begin
Pause TTS narration
Resume TTS narration
Verify the narration visualiser indicates narration is actively playing

title: Illustration is present for the initially loaded chapter
description: Verifies that opening a story in the immersive reader displays an illustration for the current chapter.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Wait for the reader content to finish loading
Verify an illustration for the current chapter is displayed

title: Open a story from archive into the immersive reader
description: Verifies a reader can browse the archive and open a published story in the immersive reader successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /archive
Click a story link from the archive list
Verify the immersive story reader view is displayed
Verify chapter content is displayed for the opened story

title: Enter the story catalogue from the landing hero
description: Verifies a visitor can use the landing page hero to navigate into the full story catalogue and see browsing content load.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page
Activate the primary call-to-action in the hero section
Verify the full story catalogue browsing view is displayed

title: Theme toggle persists across refresh and routes
description: Users can change the site theme, refresh, and navigate across pages while the chosen theme remains applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Toggle the theme setting
Press Reload
Click a navigation control to go to the landing page
Click a navigation control to go to the archive page
Click a navigation control to return to the stories catalogue
Verify the selected theme remains applied after refresh and route changes

title: Send a chatbot message and receive a response
description: Verifies a visitor can send a message to the chatbot and see a response appear in the conversation view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating chatbot trigger
Fill a short question into the chatbot message field
Submit the chatbot message
Verify a new assistant response appears in the chat conversation

title: Illustration continues to update across multiple chapter switches
description: Verifies that the illustration correctly updates when switching across several chapters in sequence without requiring a refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Wait for the reader content to finish loading
Switch to another chapter using the chapter navigation
Switch to a different chapter again using the chapter navigation
Verify the chapter illustration matches the currently active chapter after multiple switches

title: Chapter navigation remains responsive after rapid chapter switching
description: Verifies the reader remains usable when switching chapters quickly and the final selected chapter is what is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Click three different chapters in the sidebar in quick succession
Verify the chapter title and content correspond to the last chapter selected

title: Open and close WiseEpu chatbot panel
description: Verifies a visitor can open the chatbot panel and close it again without leaving the current page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating chatbot trigger
Verify the chatbot panel is displayed
Close the chatbot panel
Verify the chatbot panel is no longer displayed

title: Audio player renders only for chapters with audio and does not persist across chapters without audio
description: Users see an inline audio player only when the active chapter has audio and it disappears when switching to a chapter without audio.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Wait for the story grid to finish loading
Click the first story card in the grid
In the chapter sidebar, click chapters until you find one where an inline audio player is present
Click a different chapter where no inline audio player is present
Verify the inline audio player is not displayed for the chapter without audio

title: Continue browsing after interacting with the chatbot
description: Verifies that after sending a message and closing the chatbot, the user can still scroll and interact with the landing page normally.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating chatbot trigger
Fill a short message into the chatbot message field
Submit the chatbot message
Close the chatbot panel
Scroll down the page
Verify the page remains scrollable and landing content continues to display normally

title: Marquee shows published story titles on landing
description: Verifies the landing marquee displays story titles and appears as an animated discovery element.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the marquee section if it is not immediately visible
Verify a marquee of story titles is displayed

title: Paginate through story catalogue results
description: Users can move between catalogue pages using pagination controls and see the grid update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Wait for the story grid to finish loading
Click the control to go to the next page of results
Wait for the story grid to finish loading
Verify story cards are displayed after pagination

title: Illustration updates when changing chapters via sidebar after scrolling content
description: Verifies that after the user scrolls within the reader, switching chapters still updates the illustration correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Wait for the reader content to finish loading
Scroll within the reader content area
Switch to a different chapter using the chapter navigation
Verify the chapter illustration updates for the newly active chapter

title: Landing story preview remains accessible after using hero CTA
description: Verifies the landing page story preview section is reachable and viewable as a discovery aid before leaving for the catalogue.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the story catalogue preview section
Verify a story catalogue preview is displayed

title: Scroll progress indicator responds during landing page scroll
description: Verifies the landing page scroll progress indicator reacts to scrolling and remains visible while the user navigates the hero section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page
Scroll further down the page
Verify the scroll progress indicator has visibly changed from its initial state

title: Illustration remains consistent when reselecting the same chapter
description: Verifies that selecting the currently active chapter does not incorrectly change the displayed illustration.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Click a story card to open the immersive reader
Wait for the reader content to finish loading
Select the currently active chapter in the chapter navigation
Verify the chapter illustration remains the same for the active chapter

title: No-results state when filters narrow the catalogue
description: Users see a clear empty state when filters produce no matching stories and can recover by clearing or changing filters.

steps.description: Navigate to /stories
Wait for the story grid to finish loading
Adjust filtering controls to an uncommon combination intended to narrow results heavily
Wait for the results to update
Clear filters or change filters back toward a broader selection
Verify story cards are displayed after relaxing filters

title: Marquee continues moving over time
description: Verifies the story title marquee continuously scrolls rather than freezing on a single position.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the marquee section if it is not immediately visible
Wait for 2 seconds
Verify the marquee content position has changed compared to when it first appeared
